Dashboard.title: PolySports
Dashboard.subtitle: Follow the smart money. Win like the whales.
Dashboard.heroTagline: Real-time whale tracking on Polymarket sports markets.
Dashboard.noEvents: No markets tracked yet. Check back soon.
Dashboard.sentimentDescription: The heaviest whale volume is currently on

Stats.title: Performance Statistics
Stats.subtitle: How well are the whales beating the market? Based on settled events only.
Stats.noData: No settled events yet. Stats will appear once events are settled.
Stats.adjustedWinRateDesc: Weights wins by how unlikely they were
Stats.glossaryEdge: Actual win rate minus the market-implied win rate. Positive means beating the market.
Stats.glossaryExpected: Sum of all implied probabilities divided by event count. This is what a random bettor would achieve.
Stats.glossaryAdjusted: Each win is weighted by its difficulty (1/implied probability). Harder wins count more.
Stats.glossaryRoi: Return on investment using settled odds. Only shown for events with odds entered.
Stats.consensusDesc: Win rate by how unified whale money was on one outcome
Stats.consensusGlossary: Consensus = % of total whale volume on the single most-backed outcome.
Stats.glossaryConsensus: % of total whale volume concentrated on the top outcome. High consensus = whales agreed strongly on one side.
Stats.convictionDesc: Events where at least one trade ≥ $50k was placed. Win rate based on which outcome big money backed.
Stats.bigTradeSubtitle: Does size matter? Granular breakdown of $50k+ individual trades to find where the real edge is.
Stats.tierDesc: Does a single bigger trade signal stronger conviction?
Stats.tierGlossary: Win rate is per individual trade — did that trade's chosen outcome win?
Stats.oddsBandDesc: Big trades on favourites vs. underdogs — where is the edge concentrated?
Stats.oddsBandGlossary: Price = implied probability at trade time. Edge = win rate minus expected (mid-band implied probability).
Stats.loneDesc: Single $50k+ trade on an event vs. multiple big trades agreeing.
Stats.loneGlossary: Solo = only 1 big trade ($50k+) placed on the event. Corroborated = 2+ big trades agreeing.
Stats.divDesc: When the largest single trade goes against the crowd — is that a better signal?
Stats.divGlossary: Divergent = the single biggest trade backed a different outcome than the majority whale consensus.
Stats.splitDesc: Events where $50k+ trades landed on multiple different outcomes (smart money was split).
Stats.splitGlossary: Win rate = did the outcome with the largest single big trade win? Useful to know how often split markets are noise vs. signal.
Stats.noConvDesc: Events where every trade was under $50k — the small-money baseline. Is the overall edge driven by big trades or by these too?

Teams.title: Team Stats
Teams.subtitle: Which teams do whales back — and which ones actually deliver? Based on settled events only.
Teams.noData: No settled events yet. Team stats will appear once events settle.
Teams.leaderboardDesc: Every team whales put real money on. Sorted by biggest edge.
Teams.darlingsDesc: Teams whales backed that outperformed the market most.
Teams.fadesDesc: Teams whales backed that burned money. Consider fading.
Teams.minEventsNote: Only teams with at least 3 backed events are shown to filter out noise.
Teams.glossaryTeam: A team = an outcome whales backed in a settled sports event (e.g. "Lakers", "Yes"). Scoped by sport to avoid collisions.
Teams.glossaryEdge: Actual win rate minus average market-implied win rate across the events whales backed this team.
Teams.glossaryRoi: Flat $100 stake per event using each event's settled odds. Only counts events with odds entered.
Teams.glossaryPp: The unit for edge. If the market implied a 60% win chance and the team won 80% of the time, the edge is +20pp — not 20%, but 20 percentage points. It measures how far off the market's prediction was, not how much money you made.

TeamDetail.subtitle: Whale-backed events for this team
TeamDetail.noData: No settled events for this team in the selected range.
TeamDetail.recentFormDesc: Last 10 settled events, oldest left → newest right.
TeamDetail.convictionSplitDesc: Win rate split by whether at least one ≥ threshold trade landed on this team.
TeamDetail.consensusSplitDesc: Win rate split by whether ≥ 60% of whale volume on the event was on this team.
TeamDetail.historyDesc: Every settled event whales backed this team. Click a row to open the event.
